subcodes.first_line: O Isma'il! Thy call hath reached the hearing of the Lord of Names, and the answer hath been sent down from the heaven of Divine Will [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمعیل ندایت باصغای مالک اسما فائز و جواب از سماء مشیت الهی نازل
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
